parameters.jsCode:
const p = $('Normalize Identity Event').first().json;
return [{ json: { key: p.idem_key, tenant_id: p.tenant_id, workflow: '14-identity-lifecycle' } }];

const p = $('Normalize Identity Event').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: p.tenant_id, correlation_id: p.correlation_id } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: "error", correlation_id: $("Normalize Identity Event").item.json.correlation_id, message: $("Normalize Identity Event").item.json.invalid_reason }) }}
